description: Main chat workspace — chat input area with the assistant, also has 'history' and 'last activity' buttons that open a sidebar (URL stays the same)
Active conversation thread with the AI assistant — message bubbles and input box
Agents main page — list of all user agents with a 'צור סוכן' (create agent) button that opens 3 agent type options (NOT a single agent's edit page)
Edit a Spark agent — configuration and settings page for a Spark-type agent

description: Edit a Workflow agent — visual flow builder for a workflow-type agent
Create a new Spark agent via chat — interactive chat-based agent creation flow
Skills library page — list of available skills/tools the assistant can use
Triggers configuration page — automations that start flows based on events
Knowledge base page — ingested documents and folders, upload and management UI
Conversation history list — past conversations with timestamps
Usage analytics dashboard — charts and metrics about platform usage
Support / help center home page
Integrations and connectors page — MCPs, external services, API connections

Product documentation article — introduction to the Workspace structure, core tools, and chat interaction basics. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains the User Profile area, including language settings, support options, and profile preferences. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes the Side Menu and its quick links to new chat, knowledge, agents, skills, schedules, activity, history, and support. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — covers basic chat usage, prompts, language models, and core AI interaction concepts. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — overview of the main chat workspace and actions such as selecting agents, using models, and creating Spark agents. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains what agents are, how they appear in the workspace, and how users activate or use shared/built-in agents. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains automated scheduled tasks, recurring agent runs, and in-app completion notifications. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — introduction to Jeen AI agents, their purpose, types, creation, configuration, and operation. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains workflow components as modular no-code blocks for building process flows. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes Spark Agents for fast prompt-based text tasks and document attachment options. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains Cortex Agent creation and advanced structured settings for detailed agent behavior control. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes Workflow Agents and how visual connected components define structured automation logic. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains testing workflow flows in the Playground and monitoring sessions for validation and debugging. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — overview of Skills as reusable packaged capabilities for consistent instructions, logic, and domain behavior. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — guide for uploading documents and controlling processing/conversion options for knowledge sources. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains the RAG mechanism used to retrieve information from uploaded organizational documents for AI responses. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains uploading Excel/CSV files with chunking so large datasets can be processed efficiently. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains connectors and MCP for connecting the chat to external organizational systems like Outlook, Jira, and Monday. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — overview of MCP apps/connectors that let agents perform external tool actions directly from chat. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — admin setup checklist covering resource allocation, token limits, user permissions, and initial platform configuration. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains admin role management, hierarchical permissions, and access control for features and modules. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes design management for organization branding, themes, and default visual appearance. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains viewing and editing the organization-wide system prompt that defines the assistant’s base behavior. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes the admin analytics dashboard with activity metrics, KPIs, graphs, filters, and engagement trends. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains input and output guardrails for enforcing ethical and organizational AI usage policies. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — covers organization settings for defaults such as name, language, available agents, models, templates, and platform behavior. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — explains managing users, groups, identity provider sync, and token limits across the organization. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — describes audit logs for tracking administrative actions, system changes, filtering, searching, and exporting logs. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.

Product documentation article — overview of Jeen.ai FinOps for AI cost governance, budget management, and usage oversight across users, agents, workflows, and vendors. Includes the docs side navigation and header controls for home/menu, notifications, and the user/profile menu.
Jeen Admin login page — email-based sign-in screen with an email field and Continue button, plus a top Menu button and Language selector.

Admin roles management page — shows default and custom account roles, default role settings, and a permissions editor. Includes role cards such as Company Admin, Unit Admin and Builder plus an "Edit role" button and collapsible admin sidebar.

Admin design management page — create and manage UI themes with theme list, active/default status, color and logo settings, and a live preview. Includes actions like create theme, rename, delete theme, remove logo, and logo upload drop zone without changing the URL.
Admin system prompts page — configure the main system instruction used for AI interactions and assign or edit prompt content. Includes cancel/save controls and a close action within the editor area.
Admin skills library page — manage organization skill packages, showing an empty-state when no skills are found. Includes upload, create skill, status filter, cancel and save changes controls.

Admin audit logs page — table of administrative and system changes with timestamp, category, action, entity, scope and actor columns. Includes CSV export plus date range, category and action type filters.

Admin analytics dashboard — tracks platform usage, engagement, performance and agent metrics with charts and KPI cards. Includes in-page tabs for reports, user activity, performance/errors and agents, plus filters for date range, users and model.

Admin organization assets page — lists user-created agents, skills and triggers across the organization with owner, visibility and status details. Includes in-page tabs for agents, skills and triggers plus filters such as owner, group and status.

Admin organization settings page — configure organization defaults such as profile, memory, help center, languages, default role and token limits. Includes in-page tabs for general, agents, templates and models, with cancel/save changes controls for unsaved settings.
